underlying_goal: Implement a Linear ticket to allow users to set their phone number inline from the dial-in panel instead of being redirected to settings
friction_detail: The initial Inertia useForm approach caused a redirect bug, then three iterations of fetch fixes were needed because the error toast kept firing despite successful saves.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement an inline phone number input in a dial-in panel; Claude built it across multiple files but required several iterations to fix a persistent error toast bug caused by the fetch/redirect handling.
